name: Baked Potatoes with Western Style Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound smoked ham, fully cooked, diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a large saucepan or microwave-safe dish.
2. Saute green peppers and celery until crisp-tender, about 3 minutes.
3. Stir in dry mustard and flour; cook for 1 minute.
4. Gradually add milk to the mixture. Cook until thickened.
5. Add grated Cheddar cheese and stir until melted.
6. Add diced smoked ham and Tabasco sauce.
7. Heat through. Serve over hot baked potatoes.
